struct Record {
    name: String,
    score: f64,
}

fn sort_records(records: &mut [Record]) {
    // BAD: allocates String inside sort comparator
    records.sort_by(|a, b| {
        let key_a = format!("{}_{:.2}", a.name, a.score);
        let key_b = format!("{}_{:.2}", b.name, b.score);
        key_a.cmp(&key_b)
    });
}
